title: Completed Docs Viewer Shell Extraction
summary: Moved Docs Viewer source, runtime modules, CSS, config defaults, UI text, build scripts, local service, management dispatcher, write workflows, generated reads, live rebuild helpers, shell template, launcher, and Docs Viewer-owned tests into the tracked top-level docs-viewer/ boundary.
effect: Docs Viewer now runs as an independent loopback service with built-in /docs/ manage mode, while Local Studio links to it as a peer service and public /library/ and /analysis/ remain Jekyll-hosted read-only route adapters. The old Studio-owned Docs Viewer source locations, Local Studio shell hosting, /studio/api/docs proxy path, root docs/search wrappers, and old-path compatibility shims are removed.
verification: focused Local Studio Docs Viewer boundary, navigation adapter, Data Sharing route, and Data Sharing review smokes passed
focused JavaScript, Ruby, and Python syntax/import checks passed
